channel.title: FixTheVuln Blog
channel.description: Expert cybersecurity insights, threat analysis, and IT certification study guides.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Jun 23–Jul 07, 2026
item.description: 8 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 10.0. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: AI Security Trend Roundup — Jul 03, 2026
item.description: 32 curated AI security updates from OWASP GenAI, arXiv, Simon Willison, CISA, and 4 more sources covering Jun 26–Jul 03. Every item credited to its original author.
